text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki hasn't turned up for training yet. I
start to wonder where she is, when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! My deepest apologies for keeping you
waiting. I have no excuse for this lack of
discipline!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am fully prepared to face the consequences of
this inexcusable blunder!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In truth, I struck out reflexively at a bicycle that
looked like it was about to hit me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, both the bicycle and its rider were
unscathed. We agreed that it was a case of
mutual carelessness, but I forgot about training in
all of the confusion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki seems remorseful about being late,
so I let her off with a warning to be careful in the
future.
